visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two young Asian women stand in the center of a wide Costco warehouse aisle; the woman on the left in a tan hoodie smiles and speaks, while the woman on the right in a white bucket hat and black blouse gestures animatedly. Shelves of bulk goods and shoppers fill the background under bright overhead lights. Large colorful text overlays appear at the top and bottom of the frame. (2) A close-up shows stacks of light beige Viva brand boxes on a wooden pallet; the boxes have floral prints and images of walnuts and cranberries. The camera is static, focusing on the sheer volume of product. Yellow and white text boxes appear near the bottom. (3) In a bright indoor kitchen with a grey marble-patterned countertop, the two women are seated and hold up small transparent and green snack packets. They exhibit cheerful facial expressions and point at the products. A large text banner sits at the bottom of the screen. (4) A close-up shows a hand pouring trail mix onto a light blue ceramic plate; the mix includes brown almonds, crinkly red cranberries, and green seeds. The background is the neutral-toned kitchen counter. Large variety-style text with colorful borders appears over the plate. (5) A woman lies on a dark brown leather sofa next to a small white Maltese-style dog; a hand extends a product packet toward her, causing her to react with an open-mouthed expression of joy. Bold text with a star graphic appears in the center. (6) In a close-up, a spoon stirs trail mix into thick white yogurt in a pink pig-shaped bowl; the women then eat the mixture, looking at the camera with wide eyes and satisfied smiles. Flashing text and graphic rays surround the women as they hold the product boxes.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 不浪費年費 好市多必買推薦. (2) [Subtitle]: 內行的人 都知道買這個. (3) [Subtitle]: 平常就有在吃 比零食更健康的. [Slogan]: 萬歲牌總匯點心包. (4) [Slogan]: 現在折110元 12/8-12/21. (5) [Subtitle]: 549元 現在折價110元. (6) [Subtitle]: 折完只要439. (7) [Subtitle]: 不囤個幾箱回家 真的太可惜了. (8) [Slogan]: 限時特價439元 12/8-12/21. (9) [Subtitle]: 裡面有20包 獨立包裝 攜帶方便之外 也更新鮮 不用怕油耗味. (10) [Subtitle]: 每顆都渾圓飽滿 新鮮酥脆. (11) [Subtitle]: 有杏仁、蔓越莓、核桃、榛果、綠葡萄乾、枸杞及南瓜籽仁. (12) [Subtitle]: 每包只要22元. (13) [Subtitle]: 疲憊時 嘴饞時 隨時來一包 補充優質油脂 就能得到滿滿能量及幸福感. (14) [Subtitle]: 我的隱藏吃法是 無糖優格 加上一包總匯點心包 就像吃聖代一樣 口感更豐富之外 也比其他甜點更健康. (15) [Subtitle]: 現在買最划算 趕快分享會去好市多的人. [Variety]: 優惠囤貨很值得!

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators, approximately 8 shoppers and staff in the background at Costco.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Two young women; one with long dark hair in a tan hoodie and black choker, the other with medium hair in a white bucket hat and black ruffled top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Starts in a large Costco warehouse with high metal shelving, industrial lighting, and pallets of goods. Shifts to a modern home kitchen with a grey marble countertop and light-colored walls. Briefly shows a living room with a dark leather sofa.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Two female voices dominate the audio track, speaking Mandarin with a very high speech rate and bright, energetic prosody. The delivery is characterized by high pitch variability and frequent rising intonations indicating excitement. A mid-tempo electronic pop music track with a clear, steady 4/4 beat plays at a moderate volume in the background. A slight environmental reverb is present, suggesting a large, high-ceilinged indoor space with a low-level murmur of distant human chatter. (2) A sharp, high-frequency digital 'ding' bell sound effect or chime occurs precisely as a promotional point is made. The vocal intensity of the speakers remains high and projected, while the background music continues seamlessly with its rhythmic synth bassline and electronic drums. (3) The acoustic texture shifts to a drier, more intimate room tone as the scene changes to a kitchen. The sound of plastic snack packaging being vigorously crinkled and then torn open creates sharp, high-frequency transients that stand out clearly in the mix. The background music remains constant. (4) A series of rapid, short-duration percussive impacts are heard as hard objects, like nuts and seeds, fall onto a ceramic or glass plate surface. This creates a bright 'pitter-patter' sound with narrow spectral bandwidth. The voices remain animated, describing the contents with high arousal. (5) A distinct metallic clinking and jingling sound of several coins being shaken or dropped against each other is heard for about one second. This is immediately followed by a short, synthesized 'pop' digital UI sound effect. The music's beat remains steady throughout this sequence. (6) Soft, low-frequency squelching and scraping sounds occur as a spoon moves through a viscous substance like yogurt against the side of a bowl. The female voices transition from talking to expressive interjections like 'Mmm!' and 'Wow!' with high valence and arousal, accompanied by the sound of chewing. (7) The background music track swells slightly in volume for the final signature, featuring a bright synthesizer melody. The speakers' voices remain high-pitched and enthusiastic, delivering a final call-to-action until the track ends with a hard cut at the final second.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Introduction -> Value Proposition -> Application Scenarios -> Eating Experience -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a promotional review for Viva Roasted Trail Mix available at Costco. It captures viewers with a hook about maximizing their Costco membership, then details a current discount and the nutritional benefits of the product's varied ingredients. By demonstrating portability and a creative serving suggestion (mixing with yogurt), the video appeals to health-conscious snackers and bargain hunters, using high-energy female hosts to drive engagement.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video focuses entirely on a single product's features, price, and availability at a specific retailer, using promotional language and showing the packaging prominently.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-density editing and frequent text overlays are typical of short-form social commerce videos aimed at rapid information consumption.
